overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a transition from driving through a neon-lit futuristic city intersection to walking through dense urban streets. The clip follows a red-haired character navigating Night City's Japanese-inspired district featuring holographic advertisements, multi-level overhead structures, and a shift from clear to foggy atmospheric conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane futuristic city street with overhead walkways

events.description: blue sports car overtakes on the right side
vehicle slows to a stop and perspective shifts to pedestrian view

agents.ego_description: navigating through city traffic in a vehicle, following the flow of cars through the intersection

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking the ego vehicle on the right
black van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with Japanese characters suspended over the street
3D holographic projection of a woman in a purple dress
green steel support beams and walkways crossing above the roadway
multi-story red brick industrial building with multiple windows
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow and black diagonal stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a driving perspective through a neon-lit cyberpunk city intersection. The camera navigates between vehicles including a blue sports car and black van, passing under large holographic advertisements and green steel overhead structures. The environment features a distinctive yellow crosswalk and red brick buildings lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: exits vehicle and begins walking on the orange-tiled sidewalk
passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the orange-tiled sidewalk following a red-haired character through the dense urban corridor

notable_agents.action: red-haired character in white shirt walking ahead of the camera
pedestrian in brown jacket standing near the crosswalk entrance

entered.detail: distinctive orange geometric patterned paving stones covering the pedestrian walkway
circular neon sign with pizza slice graphic and Japanese text
large horizontal banner with Japanese text suspended across the street
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows visible at the end of the street
tall street lamp post with orange glowing light fixture

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a red-haired character walking along an orange-tiled sidewalk. The narrow corridor features neon storefronts including a pizza sign, overhead banners with Japanese text, and dense urban architecture. The camera passes other pedestrians while moving toward a futuristic glass tower visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy street level with active traffic and industrial elements

events.description: steps off the sidewalk into the street among moving traffic
steam and fog effects become denser, creating atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: moving through the street between lanes of traffic, navigating around passing vehicles in the foggy conditions

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past closely on the right side
dark van approaching from ahead with headlights on

entered.detail: thick white steam rising from street vents creating atmospheric haze
large cylindrical industrial pipes running along the building facade
orange and white striped construction barrier near the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk into the active street, navigating between passing vehicles including a silver sedan and dark van. The environment becomes increasingly foggy with steam rising from street vents. Industrial pipes line the right side of the street while the futuristic glass tower looms larger ahead, and construction barricades are visible near the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high-speed drive through a neon-lit intersection into a grounded walk through a dense, foggy urban corridor. It begins from a driving perspective, weaving between a blue sports car and a black van beneath green steel overhead structures and towering holographic advertisements. As the perspective shifts to follow a red-haired character on foot, the scene narrows into an orange-tiled sidewalk lined with Japanese banners and glowing storefronts. The camera then follows the character as they step from the sidewalk into the active street, where the clear city air gives way to rising steam and thick fog. This progression concludes as the character navigates past industrial pipes and construction barricades, moving toward a looming futuristic glass tower that dominates the hazy skyline.
